2021-22 Gonzaga Bulldogs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 28-4 (13-1, 1st in WCC MBB)

Rank: 1st in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Mark Few

PS/G: 87.2 (1st of 358)

PA/G: 66.2 (86th of 358)

SRS: 25.46 (1st of 358)

SOS: 4.50 (93rd of 358)

ORtg: 118.1 (2nd of 358)

DRtg: 89.7 (5th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +600

NCAA Tournament: (#1 seed in West)
Won West First Round (93-72) versus #16 Georgia State
Won West Second Round (82-78) versus #9 Memphis
Lost West Regional Semifinal (74-68) versus #4 Arkansas

  • WCC Reg Season Champ
  • WCC Tourney Champ
